actionCalls.name: Send_Email_At_Risk
actionCalls.label: Send Email At Risk

value.stringValue: Notification: Status of Project {!$Record.Name} is marked as "At Risk"

actionCalls.name: Send_Email_Final_Workscope_Reviewer
actionCalls.label: Send Email Final Workscope Reviewer

value.stringValue: Notification: You have been added to {!$Record.Name} as Final Workscope Reviewer

actionCalls.name: Send_Email_Final_Workscope_Reviewer_Unasign
actionCalls.label: Send Email Final Workscope Reviewer Unasign

value.stringValue: Notification: You have been removed from {!$Record.Name} as Final Workscope Reviewer

actionCalls.name: Send_Email_to_Account_Holder
actionCalls.label: Send Email to Account Holder (FPM)

value.stringValue: Notification: You have been added to {!$Record.Name} as Project Owner(Account Holder)

actionCalls.name: Send_Email_to_Account_Holder_FPM_Unassign
actionCalls.label: Send Email to Account Holder (FPM) Unassign

value.stringValue: Notification: You have been removed from {!$Record.Name} as Project Owner(Account Holder)

actionCalls.name: Send_Email_to_Account_Holder_TP
actionCalls.label: Send Email to Account Holder (TP)

value.stringValue: FPM Notification: Alert when as Project Owner(Account Holder) is assigned for Redelivery Project {!$Record.Name}

actionCalls.name: Send_Email_to_Account_Holder_TP_Unassign
actionCalls.label: Send Email to Account Holder (TP) Unassign

value.stringValue: FPM Notification: Alert when as Project Owner(Account Holder) is unassigned for Redelivery Project {!$Record.Name}

actionCalls.name: Send_Email_to_Dispute_Sign_Off
actionCalls.label: Send Email to Dispute Sign Off

value.stringValue: Notification: You have been added to {!$Record.Name} as Dispute Sign Off By

actionCalls.name: Send_Email_Workscope_Reviewer
actionCalls.label: Send Email Workscope Reviewer

value.stringValue: Notification: You have been added to {!$Record.Name} as Workscope Reviewer

actionCalls.name: Send_Email_Workscope_Reviewer_Unassign
actionCalls.label: Send Email Workscope Reviewer Unassign

value.stringValue: Notification: You have been removed from {!$Record.Name} as Workscope Reviewer

actionCalls.name: Unassign_Send_Custom_Notification_Dispute_Sign_Off
actionCalls.label: Unassign Send Custom Notification Dispute Sign Off

actionCalls.name: Unassign_Send_Email_to_Dispute_Sign_Off
actionCalls.label: Unassign Send Email to Dispute Sign Off

value.stringValue: Notification: You have been removed from {!$Record.Name} as Dispute Sign Off By

Flow.description: Added the Custom Notifications to: Final Workscope Reviewer Workscope Reviewer Account Holder(Project Owner) Project State at risk
Flow.interviewLabel: FPM: Alert for Final Workscope Reviewer {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: FPM: Alert for user notifications

recordLookups.name: Get_User_ID_for_Account_Holder_TP
recordLookups.label: Get User ID for Account Holder (TP)

recordLookups.name: Get_User_ID_for_Account_Holder_TP_Unassign
recordLookups.label: Get User ID for Account Holder (TP) Unassign

textTemplates.name: Email_Assigned_Account_Holder_FPM
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record.Account_Holder__r.Name}


This is an automated notification to inform you that you have been assigned as Project Owner(Account Owner) to the project. Please see below for some information on this project, along with a direct link to it.


Project Name: {!$Record.Name}

Project Type: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Type__c}

Associated Assembly: {!$Record.Assembly_local__r.Name}

Project Description: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Description__c}


Thanks

textTemplates.name: Email_Assigned_Account_Holder_TP
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record.Account_Holder__r.Name}


This is an automated notification to inform you that you have been assigned as Project Owner(Account Owner) to the project. Please see below for some information on this project, along with a direct link to it.


Project Name: {!$Record.Name}

Project Type: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Type__c}

Asset: {!$Record.leaseworks__Asset__r.Name}

Project Description: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Description__c}


Thanks

textTemplates.name: Email_Assigned_Dispute_Sign_Off
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record.Dispute_Signed_Off_By__r.Name}


This is an automated notification to inform you that you have been assigned as Dispute Sign Off By to the project. Please see below for some information on this project, along with a direct link to it.


Project Name: {!$Record.Name}

Project Type: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Type__c}

Asset: {!$Record.leaseworks__Asset__r.Name}

Project Description: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Description__c}


Thanks

textTemplates.name: Email_at_risk
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record.Account_Holder__r.Name}


This is an automated notification to inform you that the project where you are listed as a stakeholder has changed its statue to AT RISK. Please see below for some information on this project, along with a direct link to it.


Project Name: {!$Record.Name}

Project Type: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Type__c}

Associated Assembly: {!$Record.Assembly_local__r.Name}

Project Description: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Description__c}


Thanks

textTemplates.name: Email_Final_Workscope_Reviewer
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record.Final_Workscope_Reviewer__r.Name}


This is an automated notification to inform you that you have been assigned as a Final Workscope Reviewer to a project. Please see below for some information on this project, along with a direct link to it.


Project Name: {!$Record.Name}

Project Type: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Type__c}

Associated Assembly: {!$Record.Assembly_local__r.Name}

Project Description: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Description__c}


Thanks

textTemplates.name: Email_Unassign_Account_Holder_FPM
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record__Prior.Account_Holder__r.Name}


This is an automated notification to inform you that you have been unassigned from Project Owner(Account Holder) on the project. Please see below for some information on this project, along with a direct link to it.


Project Name: {!$Record.Name}

Project Type: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Type__c}

Associated Assembly: {!$Record.Assembly_local__r.Name}

Project Description: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Description__c}


Thanks

textTemplates.name: Email_Unassign_Account_Holder_TP
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record__Prior.Account_Holder__r.Name}


This is an automated notification to inform you that you have been unassigned from Project Owner(Account Owner) on the project. Please see below for some information on this project, along with a direct link to it.


Project Name: {!$Record.Name}

Project Type: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Type__c}

Asset: {!$Record.leaseworks__Asset__r.Name}

Project Description: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Description__c}


Thanks

textTemplates.name: Email_Unassign_Final_Workscope_Reviewer
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record__Prior.Final_Workscope_Reviewer__r.Name}


This is an automated notification to inform you that you have been unassigned from a Final Workscope Reviewer on a project. Please see below for some information on this project, along with a direct link to it.


Project Name: {!$Record.Name}

Project Type: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Type__c}

Associated Assembly: {!$Record.Assembly_local__r.Name}

Project Description: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Description__c}


Thanks

textTemplates.name: Email_Unassign_Workscope_Reviewer
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record__Prior.Workscope_Reviewer__r.Name}


This is an automated notification to inform you that you have been unassigned from a Workscope Reviewer on a project. Please see below for some information on this project, along with a direct link to it.


Project Name: {!$Record.Name}

Project Type: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Type__c}

Associated Assembly: {!$Record.Assembly_local__r.Name}

Project Description: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Description__c}


Thanks

textTemplates.name: Email_Unssigned_Dispute_Sign_Off
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record__Prior.Dispute_Signed_Off_By__r.Name}


This is an automated notification to inform you that you have been unassigned from Dispute Sign Off By on the project. Please see below for some information on this project, along with a direct link to it.


Project Name: {!$Record.Name}

Project Type: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Type__c}

Asset: {!$Record.leaseworks__Asset__r.Name}

Project Description: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Description__c}


Thanks

textTemplates.name: Email_Workscope_Reviewer
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record.Workscope_Reviewer__r.Name}


This is an automated notification to inform you that you have been assigned as a Workscope Reviewer to a project. Please see below for some information on this project, along with a direct link to it.


Project Name: {!$Record.Name}

Project Type: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Type__c}

Associated Assembly: {!$Record.Assembly_local__r.Name}

Project Description: {!$Record.leaseworks__Project_Description__c}


Thanks

textTemplates.name: NotificationBody_Account_Holder
textTemplates.text: You have been assigned to 'Account Holder' of {!$Record.Name} project.

textTemplates.name: NotificationBody_Account_Holder_Unassign
textTemplates.text: You have been unassigned from 'Account Holder' of {!$Record.Name} project.

textTemplates.name: NotificationBody_At_Risk
textTemplates.text: The project {!$Record.Name} where you are listed as a stakeholder has changed its statue to AT RISK.

textTemplates.name: NotificationBody_Dispute_Sign_Off
textTemplates.text: You have been assigned to 'Dispute Sign Off By' of {!$Record.Name} project.

textTemplates.name: NotificationBody_Dispute_Sign_Off_Unassign
textTemplates.text: You have been unassigned from 'Dispute Sign Off By' of {!$Record.Name} project.

textTemplates.name: NotificationBody_Final_Workscope_Reviewer
textTemplates.text: You have been assigned to 'Final Workscope Reviewer' of {!$Record.Name} project.

textTemplates.name: NotificationBody_Final_Workscope_Reviewer_Unassign
textTemplates.text: You have been unassigned from 'Final Workscope Reviewer' of {!$Record.Name} project.

textTemplates.name: NotificationBody_Worscope_Reviewer
textTemplates.text: You have been assigned to 'Workscope Reviewer' of {!$Record.Name} project.

textTemplates.name: NotificationBody_Worscope_Reviewer_Unassign
textTemplates.text: You have been unassigned from 'Workscope Reviewer' of {!$Record.Name} project.

textTemplates.name: NotificationTitle
textTemplates.text: You have been added to FPM Project!

textTemplates.name: NotificationTitle_For_At_Risk
textTemplates.text: Project State At Risk!

textTemplates.name: NotificationTitle_Unassign
textTemplates.text: You have been removed from FPM Project!
